entry.title: Re: Multiple alerts for HDB version upgrade, etc. from SA...
entry.content:
Hello,

As you can see these emails come from the "SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP". Please refer to the official documentation of this SAP BTP Service on how to manage these actions:

3267020 - Alert Service for SAP HANA Cloud - SAP for Me

Alerts in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal

Managing Actions | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

entry.title: Building Next Gen Product Managers @ SAP Labs India
entry.content:
Aspiring Product Management Curriculum at SAP Labs IndiaThe Product Management Forum at SAP Labs India is a vibrant hub that serves as a catalyst for collaboration, learning, and growth in the realm of Product Management. The forum has 3 primary initiatives with the objective of strengthening product thinking and taking PM learnings at SLI to the next level:

  1. Building a pool of end-to-end Product Managers (aimed for senior product managers
  2. Establishing Thought Leadership and External Community presence via knowledge sharing & gaining Outside-in perspective
  3. Grooming next generation product managers from the aspiring colleagues

I had the privilege of working closely on the third pillar, driving the “Aspiring Product Management” Curriculum. The Aspiring Product Management Curriculum is a part-time activity spread across 6 months with a program agenda that includes a combination of learning sessions, assignments, and sessions from external leaders across two phases.

The 6-months long curriculum was mainly divided into 2 phases: Phase 1 promoted an understating of SAP Big Picture by understanding SAP’s product and business strategy, diverse lines of business and industry applications at SAP, and Phase 2 focused on core Product Management principles ranging from Product Strategy and Portfolio planning to Go-to-Market and Product Design – thus promoting a holistic understanding of different verticals within the product management portfolio. The program also features assignments to implement and showcase all the learnings from the program.

This learning program aims at incorporating a gamified approach to keep participants engaged and motivated throughout the course of the program by incorporating game elements such as points, rewards, and leaderboards. Skill points are awarded for attending sessions and completing assignments, influencer points are earned by publishing blogs/articles/PoVs/external participation on the topics and learnings from the program, reputation points are earned by promoting outcomes on social media (Linkedin/Twitter) using predefined #tags, and karma points are given for supporting other team members and participating in volunteering projects.

Since the launch of the program, within the first 2 editions, the Aspiring Product Management program has garnered immensely positive feedback from over 120 colleagues who have successfully completed the program. The amazing feedback received from the participants is a testament to the fact that this program has indeed helped them to broaden their understanding of Product management function and principles. As we now embark on a 3rd edition of this program, it’s worthy to note that several colleagues from the past editions of the program have successfully transitioned to Product Management roles within SAP and others are now more confident with the freshly inculcated product mindset.

A program of such scale and successful outcome would certainly not be possible without the great leadership that we have in the SVP & MD, SAP Labs India Sindhu Gangadharan . And certainly not without the able guidance, support and encouragement from PavanKumar PVN and Deepak Padmanabha  who helped conceptualise and drive the very first instance of the program!

Justin Paul Shiva Kumar H S Ajay Nayak

#productmanagement #productthinking #aspiringPM #PMcurriculum

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content: Thanks Margit .. Can you please share what are all the corresponding learning journeys for this certification course? some of my interns are preparing for the C_HANAIMP exam and not sure which learning journeys to study for this new certification course

entry.title: Re: Field KOMV-KSCHL (13) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV4...
entry.content:
Yes. You are right...
The issue occurs for those with a smaller screen size...
Could you help by proposing a fix?
Like, can we change the SAP screen size and resolution?

Thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP JAVA accessing business rules destination is...
entry.content:
I'm a developer from the SAP Cloud SDK team.

The error message "The destination service responded with an error: 'Bad credentials'" indicates that the BTP Destination Service was unable to resolve an access token with the OAuth2 Client Credentials grant. That means the request you ran with Postman does not work for the service respectively.

SAP Cloud SDK is not performing the token exchange/retrieval operation. Instead it fully relies on BTP Destination Service. However the SDK caches the service response for a few minutes.

Does the problem persist? If yes, then I would rather recommend approaching the BTP Destination Service colleagues.

entry.title: How to create authentication(Sign up and login page) page in sap build apps ?
entry.content: I am creating an app using sap build apps. How can i create register and login page? In appgyver we have firebase. But for build apps is there any way?

entry.title: Re: The amount format changes based on destination country
entry.content: Thank you, Sandra Rossi... We will be implementing your proposed solution.. Thanks a lot 🙂

entry.title: Re: Create condition table in EWM
entry.content: Hi Daniil, if we try this, and we transport it into the q-system, how do we get it out of the q-system again, if desired? IMG activity where you enter your condition table layout does create your tables also local in the test system. its not possible to delete the table and transport bc its also local thenin test system.

entry.title: Re: QA33 NO LAYOUTS FOUND
entry.content: Take the inputs from SAP note 840321

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Java connection to OnPremise destination serv...
entry.content: Please check whether you actually have an SAP Cloud Connector configured in your CF account that's able to serve route http://devsage:9999

entry.title: Building Next Gen Product Managers @ SAP Labs India
entry.content:
Aspiring Product Management Curriculum at SAP Labs IndiaThe Product Management Forum at SAP Labs India is a vibrant hub that serves as a catalyst for collaboration, learning, and growth in the realm of Product Management. The forum has 3 primary initiatives with the objective of strengthening product thinking and taking PM learnings at SLI to the next level:

  1. Building a pool of end-to-end Product Managers (aimed for senior product managers
  2. Establishing Thought Leadership and External Community presence via knowledge sharing & gaining Outside-in perspective
  3. Grooming next generation product managers from the aspiring colleagues

I had the privilege of working closely on the third pillar, driving the “Aspiring Product Management” Curriculum. The Aspiring Product Management Curriculum is a part-time activity spread across 6 months with a program agenda that includes a combination of learning sessions, assignments, and sessions from external leaders across two phases.

The 6-months long curriculum was mainly divided into 2 phases: Phase 1 promoted an understating of SAP Big Picture by understanding SAP’s product and business strategy, diverse lines of business and industry applications at SAP, and Phase 2 focused on core Product Management principles ranging from Product Strategy and Portfolio planning to Go-to-Market and Product Design – thus promoting a holistic understanding of different verticals within the product management portfolio. The program also features assignments to implement and showcase all the learnings from the program.

This learning program aims at incorporating a gamified approach to keep participants engaged and motivated throughout the course of the program by incorporating game elements such as points, rewards, and leaderboards. Skill points are awarded for attending sessions and completing assignments, influencer points are earned by publishing blogs/articles/PoVs/external participation on the topics and learnings from the program, reputation points are earned by promoting outcomes on social media (Linkedin/Twitter) using predefined #tags, and karma points are given for supporting other team members and participating in volunteering projects.

Since the launch of the program, within the first 2 editions, the Aspiring Product Management program has garnered immensely positive feedback from over 120 colleagues who have successfully completed the program. The amazing feedback received from the participants is a testament to the fact that this program has indeed helped them to broaden their understanding of Product management function and principles. As we now embark on a 3rd edition of this program, it’s worthy to note that several colleagues from the past editions of the program have successfully transitioned to Product Management roles within SAP and others are now more confident with the freshly inculcated product mindset.

A program of such scale and successful outcome would certainly not be possible without the great leadership that we have in the SVP & MD, SAP Labs India Sindhu Gangadharan . And certainly not without the able guidance, support and encouragement from PavanKumar PVN and Deepak Padmanabha  who helped conceptualise and drive the very first instance of the program!

Justin Paul Shiva Kumar H S Ajay Nayak

#productmanagement #productthinking #aspiringPM #PMcurriculum

entry.title: Re: Create DB table based on CDS's structure.
entry.content: Give the name of your own table to DD FM not the CDS view name. (The table you "Create a table in SE11")

entry.title: Re: Hide Save Button (BTP, RAP)
entry.content:
@sebastian_wilhelm1 

Could you tell me why you want to hide the save button? If it's for a read-only scenario, you can achieve it simply by not creating a Behavior Definition.

entry.title: Re: where to check administrative data - Account Group in...
entry.content: It would be in Customer General Data tab as shown below

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
Hi @Giridharan_S 
Please check the following site SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS06 where you can find among other information under How to prepare the leaning journey. 
However this certification will be retired on 2024-03-28.
You can find more details on our Our  Certification Transformation site which also includes the link to the SAP Certification Recommendation document 
In this document you can find the recommendation for recertification: C_HANAIMP will be renamed to C_HAMOD. 
No re-certification required for those already certified in C_HANAIMP.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda ,
crucial functionality for me is to search posts with keywords, limited by tag(s).
For example, I would like to see all posts with phrase "dashboard" on SAP Managed Tag "C4C Analytics".
Example 2. I would like to see all posts with phrase "accounts not replicating", tagged as "C4C Sales" OR "C4C Service".

Is this functionality on your roadmap?

Best regards,
Adam

entry.title: Re: augment_update Method not called
entry.content: The augment methods are called before the save routine - after pressing the "Save" or "Create" button on the object page. And only, if there has been changes on the BO

entry.title: Allocate last number of the interval while creating the vendor
entry.content:
While creating the vendor in vendor group I am getting the error like below 

Allocate last number of the interval

 

Please answer my query

entry.title: Re: Hide Save Button (BTP, RAP)
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasuatke! Thanks for you reply.

In my App, a user can maintain article data (ad-hoc) and by pressing a button "Post Goods Movement" an OData Servie on an on-premise system triggers the Post Goods Movement Process. So, I don't want to save any data on the DB. Therefore there must no "Save" Button. Or is there another way, to create a transactional app without the need of saving data?

I'm working with a managed Scenario with OData V4).

entry.title: Re: Integration of a DM Side-by-Side Extension into Fiori...
entry.content:
Hi,
It's currently not possible to manually add custom tiles to external apps to DM Launchpad.
Alternatively, you can evaluate if using SAP Launchpad Service in BTP to mix and match DM apps and your custom tiles would fullfil your requirements.
Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: "Error calling pricing service layer (method SAVE)" when trying subscription to sales order
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to configure to create sales order from Subscription order. I created Sales order with name and number range same as subscription order. Also in Data exchange in service class = CL_CRMS4_SOM_SALESDOC_FWD and Transaction Cat = BUS2000265.

While trying to create subscription order in fiori, i am getting following error:

Message class - CRMS4_PRC_ADAPTER, Message number - 007, Message Text - Error calling pricing service layer (method SAVE).

Can someone please help.

entry.title: Re: AI/ML apps and Visual inspection APIs Deprecated
entry.content:
Hi,

The new AI/ML Visual Inspection is currently in BETA. GA is planned for 24.05 release in May, learn more at: 

3419039 - Additional Information and Manual Activities for SAP Digital Manufacturing, Release 2402
3435403 - Additional Information and Manual Activities for SAP Digital Manufacturing, Release 2405

AI-driven Visual Inspections (BETA), powered by SAP Digital Manufacturing 
Video: https://buff.ly/3uTmDib
IVJ: https://buff.ly/3uRP7ZE

The new APIs can be found in API Business Hub at: https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_vimodel/resource/InspectionResults

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: C4C V2 Rest API - Account master data
entry.content:
Hi community,

we are transforming to C4C V2 and have to switch our integration with datasphere from oData to Rest API now. So far I'm aware of the reference https://api.sap.com/package/SAPSalesServiceCloudV2/rest and here especially the opportunity service (https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_opportunity/overview). Here I also find the account ID and name. But I need more of the account master data like e.g. information about the industry of an account. 

Which service can I use, to get this additional master data information of accounts?

thanks in advance for your feedback and support.

Best Regards - Christian

Grace Nesuwo

entry.title: Re: SAP Direct Distribution - A New Mobile App for Direct Store Delivery
entry.content:
Hi @NaumanAH,

Thanks for your feedback! Indeed, a limited number of printers were supported within the “old” DSD mobile solution and it is not planned to provide additional drivers for this solution anymore.

Anyhow, we are currently working on the printer integration for the NEW version of SDD Mobile based on S/4HANA. We'll provide more information about default printer integrations and extensibility options as soon as it is released. We'll consider your feedback regarding this and keep you and the community posted on the implementation concepts.

Best regards,
SDD Mobile Team

Can you advise where and how to change the BEN enrollment workflow approvers after hiring?

Or if the workflow itself can be removed?

entry.title: Re: Some of the transactions are taking more time from DB...
entry.content: Hi Sandra Check this SAP note 2524975 Performance tracing overview: SAT, ST05 & ST12 traces

entry.title: Re: Line Monitor
entry.content:
Hi @patwage , if my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as the solution.

Thanks,
Manoel

entry.title: Custom fields are now available for "Manage Customer Line Items" and "Manage Supplier Line Items"
entry.content:
You may know our blog post Need another field in Manage Customer Line Items or Manage Supplier Line Items?, in which we showed you how you can use data source extension to add missing fields to your apps.
With data source extension, however, you can only add fields that SAP delivers as additional fields for a data source. But what if you need a completely different field?

Well, there is good news: as of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, you can create your own fields, also known as custom fields, and use them in the Manage Customer Line Items app or the Manage Supplier Line Items app. You just need to  create your field in the Accounting: Journal Entry Item business context and enable usage of the field in the Manage Customer Line Items app or the Manage Supplier Line Items app. For more information on how to do this, see our Product Assistance on How to Enable Custom Fields.

Want to know more?

If you’re looking for a more detailed example and use case for custom fields, check out our Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case blog post.

Thanks for reading this blog post. We hope that you’re just as excited as we are that you can now use custom fields to enhance the Manage Customer Line Items app or the Manage Supplier Line Items app.

Feel free to leave any comments you may have below.

For more information about the apps, see:
Manage Customer Line Items
Manage Supplier Line Items

entry.title: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
You may have read our blog post Custom fields are now available for "Manage Customer Line Items" and "Manage Supplier Line Items", in which we introduced custom fields for the Manage Customer Line Items app and the Manage Supplier Line Items app. In this blog post, we’d like to give you a more detailed example and use case for custom fields.

Let’s assume you want to display profit center information in the Manage Customer Line Items app. As explained in our blog post on How to Display Profit Center Assignments for AR/AP Line Items, you may need this because the Manage Customer Line Items app usually shows exactly one line item per invoice, but revenue postings can be distributed over different profit centers. You would see this as separate line items in the Manage Journal Entries app.

In our example, you want to display the profit center with the highest amount in the Responsible Unit custom field in the Manage Customer Line Items app. To do so, you must simply follow this five-step procedure:

Step 1: Create a custom field

You open the Custom Fields app and create the Responsible Unit custom field in the Accounting: Journal Entry Item business context.
The following screenshot shows the dialog box in which you enter your details to create the custom field:


Step 2: Enable field usage

You then enable the field for the Manage Customer Line Items app and publish your custom field. For more information, see How to Enable Custom Fields.
The following screenshot shows the search result for Customer Line Item on the User Interface tab. The Enable Usage column is highlighted.

 

The following screenshot shows that the field usage has been enabled in the OData service and the related usage in the relevant CDS view:


The custom field has now been defined and is available in the Manage Customer Line Items app. The following screenshot shows the field in the Settings dialog box.


Step 3: Create and publish the custom logic to fill the Responsible Unit custom field

To set a value in the newly-created custom field, you can implement a custom logic that determines a value for the custom field.
To do so, you open the Custom Logic app to create your implementation of the Journal Entry Substitution (FIN_ACDOC_SUBSTITUTION) extension point. For more information, see Creating Implementations.
The following screenshot shows the extension point search result:



Step 4: Write custom code

Once you’ve published the implementation, you can write your custom code.
The following code snippet gives you an idea of how you can define which data you want to display in your Responsible Unit custom field in the Manage Customer Line Items app. Note that this code snippet is for demonstration purposes only.
In our example, you want to display the profit center from the G/L line item that has the amount.

Step 5: Test custom field in the Manage Customer Line Items app

This new custom logic is applied to all new and changed items only. To test the custom logic, simply select an existing line item, use the Edit Line Item function, and change the item.


Thanks for reading this blog post. We hope that it gave you an idea of how you can use custom fields to enhance the Manage Customer Line Items app. The same is possible for the Manage Supplier Line Items app, too.
Feel free to leave any comments you may have below.

For more information about the apps, see:
Manage Customer Line Items
Manage Supplier Line Items

entry.title: How to add new selection fields in MSR_TRC_C - Tracking of Customer Returns
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

We are implementing SAP ARM solution in Italy in an S/4Hana system on premise, our customer required to add some new selection fields in the T-Code MSR_TRC_C - Tracking of Customer Returns but till now we could not find any enhancement in the related program. Do you have any insight about how to enhance this T-Code?

Thanks in advance for helping

Maria

entry.title: Withholding tax in I_WITHHOLDINGTAXITEM not the same in Display Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
There is  a discrepancy in withholding tax between the app Display Line Items in General Ledger (App ID F2217) and CDS View (Withholding Tax Amount in Local Currency) I_WITHHOLDINGTAXITEM 

Upon review, there is a mismatch between the expected credit balance in the GL and the displayed debit balance in the report.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax in I_WITHHOLDINGTAXITEM not the same...
entry.content: See kba 3228045 Extended withholding tax with line item display - Cloud which outlines the standard design

entry.content: Awesome post Andi! Very informative and helpful for master data operations!

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content: We have upgraded to latest goal mgmt in Preview, and I have converted some of our prior year's templates so that users can copy from other plan. I get an error when trying to convert our current template (group goals), but I don't recall we ever had group goals. We have not upgraded PRD yet, and I want to make sure that I am able to convert the current template for when we do upgrade. What do I need to do to ensure I can convert once we do upgrade PRD?

entry.title: SAP Group reporting ICMR - can't find the standard CDS: SF_JOURNAL_ENTRIES_01 (Accounting)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are writing to you because we are experiencing an issue with the ICMR configuration. We have implemented scope item 40Y, and 1SG, since we are using Group Reporting.

As you can see, we don’t find the standard CDS: SF_JOURNAL_ENTRIES_01 (Accounting)

Moreover, if we open the Define matching method app, we don’t have any standard content (for example the SF01 - Sample Only! Intercompany AR and AP matching).

We have searched in the SAP portal without any result. Any help it's welcome! Do you have any idea?

Thank you, Martina.

entry.title: Re: Create DB table based on CDS's structure.
entry.content: @Raymond Thank you for your replay. The idea was to tie the new table's structure to the CDS's structure. When I will change the fields list in the select statement in the CDS (and therefor the structure of the CDS will be changed), then the new table will be created programmatically by calling FM 'DD_TABL_GET' &'DD_TABL_PUT'. The new table will be created according to the new CDS's structure. (The table's structure in SE11 is not changed – So it will not help to send the table's name to the FM.)

entry.title: sap s/4 hana
entry.content: digital transformation

entry.content:

We have got a requirement where to modify ship-to-party's address in sales order header.

During order creation or change, user can change the address manually. This has to be verified using an external API call and correct address has to be updated.

Can anyone provide any user exits or any modification option at code level to achieve this.

Thanks

entry.title: Email Inbound scenario with office 365 not working
entry.content:
Dear experts,

greetings!

We have configured a Email inbound scenario in the SAP Solman.

when we are sending emails from outlook office 365 to sap solman ,we are not receiving in the SOIN t code.

to receive emails into sap , what configuration we have to do in the outlook office 365side?

our sap solman is hosted on AWS private cloud and outlook office 365 is also on cloud.

kinldy help us/support  to receive emails to sap solman

entry.title: Generate Future dated BITs in advance from SAP CC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to generate current and future dated BITs in advance based on the details in subscriber mapping table. Currently, I'm creating an allowance using one shot rate for the entire contract duration and using recurrence rate to generating BITs. However, only current dates BITs are generating and not the future dated as per the subscriber mapping table. For eg; BITs are generating for amount $500 on 1st Jan'24 and not $700 for 1st Jun'24 (refer attached)

Can someone please guide?

Thanks

entry.title: Clean Core Strategy for vendor solutions
entry.content:
How are other customers on S/4 HANA on-premise approaching  vendor pre-built extensions for legal and regulatory requirements that are clearly non clean core and there are no plans to develop a separate non clean core solution. 

Do you stick to clean core principles categorically which potentially means increased cost of a potentially bespoke solution, or do you adopt an approach that is less dogmatic and accept a Tier 3 Extension with the inherent risk to upgrades?

entry.title: Re: Recently released patches/fixes for SAP MII
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using SAP MII 15.5.1.11 but not able to see IGrid Action on Catalog tab.I have created one .irpt page which is applet page but is not running properly and getting the below errors.I have installed the java jre1.8.0.401. Can you please suggest me why we can't see the IGrid action on catalog tab and applet page is not running on Edge which is converted as IE5 mode.

 

 

Error

Exception in thread "AWT-EventQueue-17" java.lang.IllegalStateException: Applet's parent java.security.ProtectionDomain$JavaSecurityAccessImpl.doIntersectionPrivilege(Unknown Source)
  
Exception in thread "AWT-EventQueue-20" java.lang.IllegalStateException: Applet's parent cjava.security.ProtectionDomain$JavaSecurityAccessImpl.doIntersectionPrivilege(Unknown Source)
  
Java Plug-in 11.401.2.10
Using JRE version 1.8.0_401-b10 Java HotSpot(TM) Client VM
JRE expiration date: 5/16/24 12:00 AM

Thanks and Regards,

Sunita

entry.title: Re: DO NOT Install BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP04 or 4.3 SP04 Patch 1
entry.content:
Hello, I have now tried everything to install SAP BI 4.3 SP04 Patch 2 with a mysql rds repository.
An update of SP03 Patch 9 fails because the CMS does not start, because some license files are missing in the repository. A new installation on an empty repository does not work either, because no SIA node is created.
is it now the SP04 itself no matter which patch or does it work with the mysql rds database as cms repository?
I have not found anything in the PAM notes that excludes mysql.

entry.title: Re: How to upload an image to Document Information Extraction from AppGyver?
entry.content: Both links are dead.

entry.title: Stock type is not changing from F1 to F2 in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

My expectation

Created the PO for material in Storage location AAFS. 

In EWM at beginning I expect that, the GR for inbound delivery will put the stock to be in ROD at staging area. After the ware house task the material should be placed in storage rack and storage location AAFS.

But the stock is not moving in between the storage location

And in staging area the stock type should be F1 and after the warehouse task the stock type should be F2.

Is my expectation is correct or wrong

AAFS - F2 Unrestricted in warehouse

ROD - F1 Unrestricted in put away

But this also not happening. Am I missing anything.

Have maintained the availability group to the storage location. Below are my configurations

Hello Ramya,

You can get the main asset detail which are liked with equipment from ITOB tables and followed by y can get rest of details from asset table ANLA and other asset class too.

Asset details in equipment

entry.title: Re: Function Module/BAPI for Posting with Residual Clearing
entry.content: Hi Caroline.. Tried posting Residual removing 003 line & it got posted successfully but while checking the entries at table BSEG level it is posting as partial payment not Residual....Follow-On Doc. Type(REBZT) is coming as Z instead of V. Can you please help how to post it as Residual instead of Partial

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Artificial Intelligence Community Group!
entry.content:
Post Brownfield Migration (ECC to latest S/4HANA), if we want to implement out of the box GenAI functionality like SAP S/4HANA Intelligent Collection or Sales Order Auto completion for a single Country, Single Business Unit.....  

Q1. What will be the typical project duration? Like 6 Weeks / 8 Weeks / 12 Weeks / XX Weeks  ...?

Q2. What are the typical roles are involved in Staffing Plan to deliver this project?

Like...

GenAI/AI/ML Lead - 1, FICO Consultant - 1, ABAP Consultant - 1, Security - 0.25 FTE etc.....?

entry.title: Re: Questions Regarding SAP Companion for Desktop
entry.content:
Q1: For on prem SEN they have to install it. For cloud they just need to launch a URL, but this should be done as part of startup of their machine so SAP Companion for Desktop is always running. How to do this is covered in the official documentation and also a couple of Notes.

Q2: Screenshots aren't used in Guided Tours, so the playback zoom doesn't apply. If hotspots are misplaced it is likely that the user has a different display scaling to the author. Create the GT at 100% and encourage users to use the same settings.

Q3: Absolutely critical that you (correctly) neutralize the page keys - see Tools > Context Administration > Replace Key Attributes. Details are in the official documentation.

Q4: It shouldn't make a difference, but again consistency is key to avoid problems as far as possible. Create using the default theme for your company, and encourage users to use the same theme.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@Debbie_Moses you should be able to access Reporting and filter out all group goals. as of the 1H 2024, you will be able to delete group goals via Import Performance Goal too, so as long as to succeed in identifying the group goals you may delete them via the IDs. after you delete them, you can convert the template. 

After you convert, if you wish to continue using the group goals, you may re-import them back as team goals and assign it to the users again.

entry.title: Re: Field KOMV-KSCHL (13) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV4...
entry.content:
Actually...
No, thank you.
That was a silly question...
We reduced the scale of the layout from 150% to 125% for those having the issue and the issue has not occurred.
Thank you very much 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to pass delivery date through BAPI while creating a sale order
entry.content:
Hi ,
even i am Facing the same Issue Please let me know what you did to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

As a working mom, I have always taken interest in keeping myself up-to-date with SAP SD , MM and FI. Now that I have prepared for SAP S/4HANA Sales, I request you to please provide a voucher as a token of appreciation for completing the SAP learning journey in 'Exploring SAP S/HANA Sales'.

This voucher will really help me financially as well as motivationally, propelling me forward in my career and thus proving beneficial to SAP.

Thank you,

Sincerely,

Swathi 

#Certification , #SAP_S/4HANA Sales

entry.title: Number Ranges for In-House Repair
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we are planning to restructure the Number Ranges for Sales and Billing in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and we also want to start using the In-House Repair Process.

The issue is now that we are using for Sales Documents the same numbers as the In-House Repair documents. But is seems like it is not the same number range since the numbers are different.

Is there any option to define the number ranges for In-House Repair documents?
Unfortunately I was not able to find a way to customize that.

 

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Re: Move GOS items from SOFFCONT1 to Content Server using RSIRPIRL with parameter "delete later
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently facing the same issue. Did you manage to find the solution? If it's the case, can you share it please?

Many thanks!

Kind regards,

Reda

entry.title: Material with Parallel Unit of Measure & Alt Unit of Measure
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a material with CWM activated & hence it is using parallel UOM. So we have base UOM as CS, parallel UOM as LB & we want to add an alt UOM as OZ (for recipe managemnt point of view) but we are getting below error.

Alternative unit of measure OZ must be defined as PUoM alternative

Message no. /CWM/MD008

If I change OZ as parallel UOM then I get below error-

You can only define one parallel unit of measure

Message no. SCM_MD_R3_PI024

Any solution of workaround. OZ is just needed for recipe management & not for procurement. Recipe Management is done through third party portal.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the format of a dynamic para...
entry.content:
Thanks JWiseman, so just for clarity, I'm going to create a new parameter, say "EndDate" with the only setting as the type:Date, leaving all other fields as default?

Then in the record selection, select the field name I want to retreive the values from, in this case "DetailDate" and enter: {CHKD.DETAILDATE} = year({EndDate})*10000+month({EndDate})*100+day({EndDate})

is this correct?  Many thanks for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Modify Ship-to-party's address during sales order change
entry.content: Try with USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE in MV45AFZZ

entry.title: Re: Extract data from DIRECT UPDATE ADSO using REQUEST TSN
entry.content:
Hi Loed

 

The Direct Update ADSO has no AQ. The data is written directly to the AT table. See:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/2866849cf2bb4f1aa8367f819a9910d9.html?locale=en-US

As such it is impossible to extract data from such an ADSO based on REQUEST TSN. If this is needed, either use an Inbound Only or Datamart (but do not activate requests) type ADSO.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: SAP CAR PRODLOC issues
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're facing an integration issue with Prodloc from ECC to CAR AB DDF and we need assistance. Please feel free to let me know if you've encountered this case before or if there are any checks to be performed, etc.

Steps:

1- DRFOUT object PMPL ==> OK

2- Prodloc records are integrated in staging table (/DMF/MDIF_PRLC) , PSTATUS =N

3- Once we initiate the integration via the program (/DMF/PROCESS_STAGING_TABLES), the integration into the DDF table (/DMF/PRODLOC) doesn't happen, and the Prodloc entry disappears from the staging table.

Thanks for your help.

Kher

entry.title: Re: How do I add subquery in SQ02?
entry.content:
1) Did you try to add the table in the graphical view (-> Join) right clink on linkd to switc between inner and outer join

2) Else in Extra menu  create a new structure (icon create) and write a very simple SELECT (SINGLE) statement code in the Code tab, at level 5 Record Processing to fill the structure

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP BW Request Housekeeping
entry.content: Thanks Frank for this blog. I am especially happy, that our Support Content pages are also referenced.

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content:
Hello,

we have the same issue concerning BEx QueryDesigner with Office365/64bit.

Any solutions yet?

Thanks!

entry.title: Legal Requirement in Czech Localization - Tax Declaration Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with the Sales Module in Czech republic.

We got the information that there is a specific legal requirment. 

In case the delviery takes more then 14 days or the delivery will taken place in the next month they need a Tax Declaration Invoice and the final invoice shall be without tax / VAT posting.

I was not able to find any process like this within the standard ans also no information in SAP Help - Localization specific descriptions.

 

Do you have any idea how to solve this requirment?

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Re: Modify Ship-to-party's address during sales order change
entry.content:
Hi Lakshmipathi,

Tried the same and modified XVBADR table entry for ship-to-party with update indicator as U. Still it is not working.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How do I add subquery in SQ02?
entry.content:
WITH MVKE_1 AS ( SELECT KONDM FROM MVKE WHERE VKORG = "XY" )

 

SELECT MBEW.MATNR, MBEW.LBKUM, MARA.MATKL, MVKE_1.KONDM

FROM MBEW

JOIN MARA ON MBEW.MATNR = MARA.MATNR

LEFT JOIN MVKE_1 ON MVKE_1.MATNR = MBEW.MATNR;

How do I implement it into ABAP? Also do I need to insert these tables into JOIN view first or do I just create an infoset with MBEW and then write the code

entry.title: Re: How to replicate deletion in MDG-F manually?
entry.content:
Hi Ronnie, cost centre can be marked for delete, however deleting it from CSKS table is not recommended.

As soon as you mark it for delete, you can use DRFOUT to replicate to target system.

 

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Not able to save in Content Server (Log Full issue)
entry.content:
Hi Phoo, please find information about LOG FULL situation here:

SAP MaxDB Log Area Full | SAP Help Portal

Regards Birgit (IMS SAP MaxDB)

entry.title: HANA Calculation View and Package Visibility
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working with HANA authorizations and am currently frustrated. My views are organized in several packages representing different stages of data aggregation and preparation. The last package is containing views that are supposed to be consumed by analysis for excel.

Whenever analysis for excel is opened I want to see the folder that is containing the views that are supposed to be exposed for consumption. The problem here is that in order to be able to execute these views I have to give SELECT on either _SYS_BIC schema or on all views that are used in order to create data model for the last view. That is leading to the fact that analysis for excel is seeing much more packages and views than I want it to.

I browsed through different topics and could not find any solution to that. Would really appreciate any advise or any hint on how to organize security (roles, privileges) model in HANA.

Br,
Aleks.

entry.title: Re: How to delete condition tables in testsystem
entry.content: Did you try to delete the condition in development, release and transport the Customizing request to quality, that should delete the condition table during import (since Release 3.0F)

entry.title: Custom code migration during upgrade of S/4 HANA.
entry.content:
We are planning to perform an upgrade of S/4 HANA. While in the preparation phase of the project, we have performed custom code analysis and generated the custom code analysis report.

Could you please let us know when this custom code should be adapted? Should that be done before starting SUM tool?

or the custom codes can be adapted after the upgrade?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom code migration during upgrade of S/4 HANA.
entry.content:
It is recommended to use the Decommissioning Cockpit before the migration of Custom Code. Before the conversion/upgrade, you should finish the life cycle of the decommissioning cockpit project.

During the process, you will generate some deletion transport requests to delete any objects that you do not want/do not need for after the conversion.

After this deletion transports numbers are created, they can be provided to the SUM tool and then the deletion will be done during the SUM operation.

Then, you can start the conversion/upgrade to S4 HANA and migration of the Custom Code.

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content:
Hi All,

Check this SAP notes 1995532 about the version and 64-bit MS office supported Bex

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Remove Fiori tooltips or SuccessFactors tooltips (Quick Info when mouse hove over)
entry.content:
Hello Anton,

I tried you Kill Snippet below and i was only able to get this to work on the 1 single page and not during navigation from page to page.  Not sure how i can get it to work for a whole SuccessFactors session.

There is mention that a update has resolve this Tooltips issue appearing in a recording.  I have tested this likewise and do not see this working.  Am i missing something, as I am working with SuccessFactors in recording.

I did try Dirks approach of quickly selecting a menu option and this did work, but seem a hit-and-miss approach 🙂

Many thanks
Andrew

entry.title: Re: MRP created multiple PR For Material Which Has Existi...
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have found the cause of creating extra PR. I have created the same scenario in test environment. Actually the plan delivery time in material master and purchase info record(PIR) was different. In PIR it was 42 days and in material master its just 5 days. So I think when we run MRP it considered the PIR days to calculate plan delivery date and material master days to check demand and supply. When I match both material master and PIR plan delivery time MRP doesn't created new PR.

Thanks all for your kind help.

entry.title: ASCS pse certificates expiration monitoring
entry.content:
Good day,
We use standard system monitoring via SM7.2.
We have some problems with monitoring SSL certificates expiration in our NW systems.
Monitoring works fine for ABAP application instance (STRUST), but it is not monitoring ASCS (message server) pse certificates expiration.
Our ASCS (Message server) instance on the separate server, so it has own SSL certificates (server, client). Monitoring does not see it.
Could you help us to set up monitoring for ASCS pse certificates? 
I investigated other templates, but didn't find any appropriate.

PS: In most cases ASCS uses DI certificates via symlink, but in our situation it is not possible (cluster landscape, DI separate server).
PPS: ASCS does not have WD.

entry.title: Opening a New Sap Account
entry.content: Is there a possibility of opening a new sap account under same company? If so, how much it will cost?

entry.title: Re: Standard VENDOR EVALUATION Process using SAP MM
entry.content: Very useful blog, keep posting such nice content.
